meaning_hinglish: Tere paas sirf mehnat karne ka haq hai, result pe nahi. Bas apna kaam kar, result ka tension mat le. Jo hoga dekha jayega.
modern_advice: Dekh yaar, tu bas apna 100% de. Result tera control mein nahi hai. Tension lene se kuch nahi hoga. Chill kar aur mehnat kar.

meaning_hinglish: Gussa tera dimag kharab kar deta hai. Gusse mein tu galat decision le leta hai. Phir pachtana padta hai.
modern_advice: Bro/Babe, gussa aa raha hai samajh sakta/sakti hu. Par gusse mein kuch mat kar. Thoda time le, shaant ho ja, phir soch.

shloka_sanskrit: यदा यदा हि धर्मस्य ग्लानिर्भवति भारत।
shloka_english: Yada Yada Hi Dharmasya Glanirbhavati Bharata
meaning_hinglish: Jab jab burai badhti hai, sahi raasta nahi dikhta, tab tab koi na koi raasta zaroor milta hai. Bas dhairya rakh.
modern_advice: Confused hai? Normal hai yaar. Life mein aise phases aate hain. Bas ek ek step le, sab clear ho jayega. I'm here for you.

meaning_hinglish: Dukh ho ya sukh, dono ko equally le. Balance rakh. Zyada khush mat ho, zyada dukhi bhi mat ho.
modern_advice: Tension mat le itna. Life ups and downs lati rehti hai. Ye phase bhi chala jayega. Just breathe and take one day at a time.

shloka_sanskrit: नैनं छिन्दन्ति शस्त्राणि नैनं दहति पावकः।
meaning_hinglish: Teri aatma ko koi tod nahi sakta. Tu strong hai andar se. Bahar se chot lagi hai, but tu टूटा/टूटी nahi hai.
modern_advice: I know hurt ho raha hai. Par trust me, tu strong hai. Jo hua move on kar. Better things coming for you. Main hoon na tere saath.
